commands.review_summary:
The branch adds agent-scoped provider request overrides, cron job-scoped provider header overrides, merge precedence plumbing, and focused resolver/cron persistence tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR finding by source inspection: PR head adds internal cron payload.providers, while the Gateway protocol schemas used by cron.add and cron.update still reject unknown agent-turn payload fields. This is not a current-main bug reproduction; it is a proposed-patch failure path.
